technicalBaselinePR.usage: read-only; no CC runtime ancestry is included

technicallyReusable.capability: asset resolution, state machine, FPS handling, fallback, texture cache/ref-count disposal, and marker delivery
technicallyReusable.reusePolicy: reuse unchanged unless a later integration task proves a minimal seam is required

technicallyReusable.capability: state selection, x1/x4 playback, pause/restart, flipX, transitions, diagnostics, and disposal
technicallyReusable.reusePolicy: reuse as the technical review harness after new motion exists

technicallyReusable.reusePolicy: preserve schema and semantics; revalidate visual-master-specific anchors, bounds, hashes, and provenance in future asset tasks

technicallyReusable.capability: runtime, harness, transition, frame, marker, package, and pipeline validation
technicallyReusable.reusePolicy: reuse validation structure; update expected visual hashes only in the authorized replacement task

reviewRequired.currentRole: class/synergy icon rather than a character production binary
reviewRequired.reviewQuestion: Does the icon remain semantically and visually compatible with the new Archer/Ranger language at UI scale?
reviewRequired.default: retain until a separate UI icon review identifies a readability failure

explicitlyNotArcherMigrationTargets.reason: Spirit Archer is a monster roster identity, not hero.archer; it belongs to the Core Monsters migration phase.
They may inform the style language but are outside this Archer-only task.

preservedTechnicalSemantics.policy: Art-style migration alone does not authorize semantic or runtime changes. New proportions require anchor/bounds revalidation; any necessary change is documented and approved in the future motion package rather than made here.
